title: MAT cost & context hygiene — adoption record

enforcement.description: strict: CI/validator may fail on missing .cursorignore fragments. warn_first: existing-project adoption surfaces missing root fragments as WARN until opt-in strict; a full template is still installed when root `.cursorignore` was absent.

selected_template.description: Template key, e.g. default, node, python, rails, wordpress

sidecar_suggest_writable.description: Whether MAT was allowed to materialize *.mat-suggest under .mat/docs/templates/

root_cursorignore_preserved.description: True when a root `.cursorignore` already existed and was left unchanged.

root_cursorignore_created.description: True when bootstrap wrote a new root `.cursorignore` because none was present.
